allow: Bash(uv run ruff check tests/test_root_main.py tests/test_shims.py)

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: src/chatty_commander/utils/url_validator.py
@@
-        for _family, _type, _proto, _canonname, sockaddr in addr_infos:
-            ip_str = sockaddr[0]
-            if _is_restricted(ip_str):
+        for _family, _type, _proto, _canonname, sockaddr in addr_infos:
+            ip_str = str(sockaddr[0])
+            if _is_restricted(ip_str):
                 return False
*** End Patch
PATCH)
Bash(uv run pytest -q tests/test_url_validator.py tests/test_structured_logging.py tests/test_error_handling.py tests/test_shims.py tests/test_root_main.py)
